basic_details.job_title: Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Junior Assistant, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Cine Assistant, Junior Assistant, Assistant Manager
basic_details.short_information: Kerala Public Service Commission (Kerala PSC) has released the official Cine Assistant, Junior Assistant, Assistant Manager Notification 2026 on 30 April 2026 at the official website. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced under the Kerala PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 43 years with qualifications such as SSLC or equivalent, Degree, DCA/Diploma in Computer Application, MBA, PGDCA, and relevant experience can apply online from 30 April 2026 to 03 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 43 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per para 2(i) of General Conditions; maximum upper age limit 50 years; provisional hands up to 5 years age relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: SSLC or equivalent, Degree, DCA/Diploma in Computer Application, MBA, PGDCA, Relevant experience
qualification.details: Cine Assistant: SSLC or equivalent + Two years experience in the Camera section of a reputed film studio. Junior Assistant: Degree in any discipline + DCA/Diploma in Computer Application (minimum 6 months) from Govt. recognised institute. Assistant Manager: Degree in any discipline + MBA (regular course) + PGDCA (regular course) + 2 years experience in supervisory cadre after acquiring MBA.

salary_details.details: Cine Assistant: ₹ 18,000 – 41,500/- Per Month Junior Assistant: As per company rules Assistant Manager: ₹ 55,200 – 1,15,300 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Kerala PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Kerala PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Kerala PSC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Kerala PSC Cine Assistant, Junior Assistant, and Assistant Manager posts is 03-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Kerala PSC recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies announced for the Kerala PSC recruitment drive, distributed across the posts of Cine Assistant, Junior Assistant, and Assistant Manager.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 43 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Assistant post, candidates must possess a Degree in any discipline along with a DCA/Diploma in Computer Application (minimum 6 months) from a government-recognized institute.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Kerala PSC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Kerala PSC recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these Kerala PSC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written/OMR/Online Test, if conducted, followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: The Assistant Manager post offers a salary range of ₹ 55,200 to ₹ 1,15,300 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with a PGDCA apply for the Assistant Manager role?
faq.answer: Yes, a PGDCA (regular course) is one of the required qualifications for the Assistant Manager post, along with a Degree and MBA, and relevant experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Kerala PSC website. A direct link is usually provided in the "Important Links" section of recruitment articles.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application mode for Kerala PSC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this Kerala PSC recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official Kerala PSC website.
